rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SADIE L. FORTNER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to May 21, 2014 for proper notice and to accommodate the court's schedule. Notice of the amendment to the petition was mailed April 3, prior to the filing of the amendment itself, which was filed April 7. Notice may not be mailed prior to filing the pleading that requires notice (Local Rule 14.21.A). New notice must be sent and a new proof of service filed no later than May 15, 2014.
